response.justification: Bogdan brings roughly 15-17 years of engineering experience and his current role at Naver includes hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework work, which is directly relevant. However, the role demands a director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, strategic customer advisory experience, and cloud platform depth — none of which are clearly demonstrated in this resume. His background is that of a strong senior/staff engineer and open source builder, not a principal-level AI strategist who advises enterprise customers and shapes cloud product direction.
strengths: Current work at Naver on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators shows direct hands-on engagement with agentic AI workflows
Consistent open source and entrepreneurial output (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial) demonstrates builder fluency and initiative beyond day-job scope
Track record of knowledge sharing through workshops, conference talks, and community involvement aligns with the 'inspire others' responsibility
concerns: No director-level IC profile or demonstrated experience advising strategic customers and partners on cloud and AI adoption
No advanced degree in AI or recognized industry-level AI expertise (publications, major AI products at scale, patents, or equivalent public signal)
Cloud expertise is shallow — AWS CDK appears once in a pricing context; no evidence of cloud architecture, platform strategy, or large-scale infrastructure ownership

key_factors.factor: No recognized AI expertise or advanced AI degree
